MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Continued To Mar-15-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for prove-up hearing from the presiding judge's dept. on an unlawful detainer.
Appearances: William W. Van Way, Esq. for Plaintiff, Unity Pacific , Inc.
Larry Carr, Buiding Manager for Plaintiff
No appearance by Defendant
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court grants judgment for Plaintiff
for Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 1000 Howard St. #407, S.F.
Lease forfeited.
Order signed in open court. See scanned document.
